name: Stremio iOS (Unofficial AltStore Source)
subtitle: Freedom to stream — unofficial AltStore-compatible source for iOS / iPadOS.
description: An unofficial AltStore source for Stremio iOS / iPadOS, compatible with any signing app that consumes the standard AltStore source format (Feather, AltStore Classic, AltStore PAL, ESign, Scarlet, Sideloadly, and others). Stremio's official source at dl.strem.io/apple/altstore/source.json cannot be parsed by most signing apps because it uses Apple's encrypted App Store Connect marketplace manifest format; this source points to plain IPA artifacts publicly available on the dl.strem.io CDN. Includes Stremio PAL (full-featured, com.stremio.pal), Stremio Lite (legacy, com.stremio.ios), and the surviving older iOS archive (com.stremio.one). For Apple TV (tvOS) add the separate source: stremio-tvos.json. This is an unofficial community port, not supported by Stremio.

apps.name: Stremio
apps.subtitle: Freedom to stream.
apps.localizedDescription: Stremio — a modern media center for movies, series, live TV and web channels. Expand your content library with the add-on system. Requires iPhone and iPad, iOS 13.0+. NOTE: Some features such as Apple Login and Handoff do not work in the sideloaded version.
apps.versionDescription: feat: new desktop like UI for player and navigation on iPadOS

versions.localizedDescription: feat: new desktop like UI for player and navigation on iPadOS

feat: native Stremio app for macOS
feat: automatic macOS updates with delta update support
feat: update notices for outdated app versions
feat: experimental Picture in Picture support on macOS and tvOS
feat: improved KSPlayer Picture in Picture support
feat: privacy-friendly crash analytics, configurable from settings
feat: bottom toast notifications
feat: OLED dark background setting

Playback Fixes
fix: show VLC buffering state correctly
fix: prevent VLC playback startup and end-of-video deadlocks
fix: prevent seek controls from getting stuck
fix: fix crashes while seeking
fix: keep video visible when replacing KSPlayer media
fix: show an error message when playback fails
fix: avoid lockups after autoplay finishes a video
fix: clean up player animations and timers after closing playback
fix: keep profile lock from interrupting active playback or Picture in Picture
fix: repair Infuse callback handling

Interface Fixes
fix: stabilize Settings layout, backgrounds, separators, and account rows
fix: improve loading and playback-error overlay layout
fix: improve filter button row edge fade

apps.name: Stremio Lite
apps.subtitle: Stream movies, series and more from multiple addons.
apps.localizedDescription: Stremio Lite — a lighter iOS build of Stremio. Add-on capable, modern media center. Requires iPhone and iPad, iOS 13.0+. Prefer the newer Stremio (PAL) 2.x releases when available.

apps.name: Stremio Legacy
apps.subtitle: Verified surviving legacy iOS releases.
apps.localizedDescription: Stremio Legacy — verified older iOS builds that use the historical com.stremio.one bundle identifier. Requires iPhone or iPad with iOS 13.0+. Prefer Stremio PAL or Stremio Lite unless you specifically need an older release.
